name: EGB OE TL.Z./FRESENIUS SE
summary: Fresenius SE is a global healthcare group based in Bad Homburg, Germany, offering products and services for dialysis, hospitals, and outpatient medical care. The company operates through four segments: Fresenius Medical Care, Fresenius Kabi, Fresenius Helios, and Fresenius Vamed. It provides dialysis products, infusion therapy, clinical nutrition, hospital management, and project management for healthcare facilities.
